attributes.description: Alerts when `kafka.partition.replicas > kafka.partition.replicas_in_sync` on any partition. Replication is degraded and durability is weakened.
attributes.name: [Kafka OTel] Under-replicated partitions

investigation_guide.blob:
## Kafka under-replicated partitions

### What fired
At least one partition has `replicas_in_sync < replicas`.

### Why it matters
Under-replicated partitions have weakened durability: a leader loss while under-replicated can lose messages. Usually caused by broker failures or overloaded followers.

### Triage
1. Check broker count — is a broker down?
2. Inspect broker-level saturation metrics (if available outside this receiver).
3. Look at controller logs for replication events.

### Remediation
- Restore the lost broker.
- Scale followers if they are CPU/disk bound.

### Tuning
- Fires on any under-replication. Always P1.
